easy.title: SEO Audit and Fix a Single Page
easy.description: Analyze a provided HTML page for SEO issues, identify all problems, and fix them. Include title tag optimization, meta description, heading hierarchy, image alt text, link anchor text, semantic HTML, canonical URL, and robots directives. Document each issue found and the fix applied.
easy.starterCode:
Welcome to our site
click here for services read more
Copyright 2024
easy.solution:
Professional Web Design Services

  • Home
  • Services

Welcome to our site. We offer custom web design and development services.

Explore our web design services portfolio to see our latest projects.

© 2024 Company Name

SEO fixes applied: 1. Added lang attribute 2. Optimized title tag with keywords (50 chars) 3. Added meta description (155 chars with CTA) 4. Multiple h1 removed, proper hierarchy (h1 only) 5. Semantic HTML (header, nav, main, footer) 6. Image alt text added 7. Descriptive anchor text 8. Canonical URL added 9. Robots meta tag added 10. Viewport meta for mobile

medium.title: Optimize a Multi-Page Website for SEO
medium.description: You have a 5-page website (Home, Services, About, Blog, Contact) with common SEO issues. Create an SEO optimization strategy and implement fixes for: unique title tags and meta descriptions per page, proper heading hierarchy, semantic HTML structure, image optimization, internal linking strategy, XML sitemap, robots.txt, canonical URLs, breadcrumb navigation with structured data, and Open Graph tags. Validate with the Nu HTML Checker and Lighthouse.
medium.starterCode: <!-- 5 HTML files with common SEO issues -->
medium.solution:
Multi-page SEO strategy:

1. Title tags: unique per page with keyword targeting
   - Home: "Professional Services | Company Name"
   - Services: "Web Design & SEO Services | Company Name"
   - About: "About Our Team | Company Name"
   - Blog: "Web Development Blog | Company Name"
   - Contact: "Contact Us | Company Name"

2. Meta descriptions: unique per page with CTAs
3. H1: one per page with primary keyword
4. Semantic HTML: header, nav, main, article/section, footer
5. Structured data: Organization schema (all pages), Article schema (blog), BreadcrumbList (all)
6. XML sitemap: include all pages with priority/modified dates
7. robots.txt: allow all, point to sitemap
8. Internal linking: nav links, breadcrumbs, contextual links between related content
9. Canonical: self-referencing canonical on each page
10. Open Graph: title, description, image, url on each page
11. Image optimization: descriptive filenames, alt text, WebP format, lazy loading

hard.title: Build an SEO-Friendly Blog with Dynamic Content
hard.description: Build a complete blog platform from scratch with full SEO optimization. Requirements: dynamically generated unique title tags and meta descriptions per post, proper heading hierarchy driven by content, automatic image optimization (lazy loading, alt text generation), structured data (Article, BreadcrumbList, Organization), XML sitemap generation, canonical URLs, pagination with rel="next"/"prev", tag/category pages with proper noindex handling, and automatic internal linking between related posts. Include a validation script that checks all SEO elements.
hard.solution:
Full SEO blog platform with:

1. Dynamic SEO metadata per post
2. Automatic heading hierarchy from markdown content
3. Image optimization pipeline (WebP conversion, lazy loading, auto alt text from filename)
4. Structured data injection (Article JSON-LD with all required fields)
5. Automatic XML sitemap generation with lastmod dates
6. Canonical URL handling with pagination parameters
7. Breadcrumb structured data for all pages
8. Pagination SEO: prev/next link tags
9. Tag/category pages with noindex for thin content
10. Internal linking algorithm based on tag overlap
11. SEO validation middleware that checks:
    - Unique title and description
    - Proper heading hierarchy
    - Image alt text presence
    - Semantic HTML structure
    - Structured data validity
    - Core Web Vitals optimization
